notes: (1) Touch look-around zone widened (2026-06): camera rotate-by-drag now activates across the right 70% of the screen (left dead-zone shrunk 0.4→0.3 of width) so rotation responds over more of the view on iPad/phone; the joystick + ▲▼ arrows still capture their own touches so nothing is stolen from them. (2) Offline save — TRUE-OFFLINE embed for URL-streamed scenes (?demo=1 / ?autoload=URL): on capable devices (iPad/desktop, non-phone) saveProjectZip now FETCHES the full streamed file and embeds it in the ZIP (with a download-progress toast), so the saved project opens with NO network — restore rebuilds the RAD straight from the embedded bytes (same path as a dragged-in .rad). Phones, fetch/CORS failures, or files over a 1GB cap fall back to the v0.0.16 URL-reference (a clear toast says 'online required'). Local-file scenes embed as before. Builds on v0.0.16.
